title: chore: Release v0.1.4 (Resolves #14)
head: release/v0.1.4
body:
Resolves #14

### Description
This PR prepares the final `v0.1.4` release by updating the `CHANGELOG.md` with today's date and a summary of all new features, bugfixes, and CI improvements.

### Changes
- Updated `CHANGELOG.md` to reflect `v0.1.4` release status.
- Documented major features: Docker build support, dynamic version overrides, and CI hardening.
